title: Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Classification Process
description: A visual representation of the steps involved in classifying a new data point using the Weighted K-NN algorithm, highlighting the calculation of weighted votes.
relationships: The query point is compared to the training dataset to calculate distances
The K points with the smallest distances are selected as neighbors
Each neighbor's vote is weighted, typically by the inverse of its distance
The class labels of the neighbors are summed according to their weights
The class with the highest total weighted vote is assigned as the prediction
